name: Savory Red Lentils
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the red lentils and drain well.
2. In a large pot, sauté chopped onion in a little oil until translucent.
3. Add minced garlic, salt, dill, savory, and chili powder to the onion mixture.
4. Pour in 2 cups of water and add the rinsed lentils.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 15 minutes.
6. Uncover and stir gently for an additional 5 minutes or until desired consistency is reached.
7. Serve hot with fresh bread.
